beats.subline: A marketing mind built for attention, structure, and growth.

beats.headline: He turns scattered attention into structured demand.
beats.subline: From brand positioning to content systems and campaign execution, every move is designed to make the message clearer, sharper, and harder to ignore.

beats.headline: Capabilities are not a list. They are the operating system.
beats.subline: Strategy, content, media, and execution connect into one flow — built to move brands from visibility to measurable momentum.

capabilities.title: A full-stack marketing skill set
capabilities.intro: From research and strategy to creative production, paid performance and on-ground activation — everything a brand needs under one roof.

items.label: Strategy
items.title: Brand Strategy
items.value: Positioning, funnels and channel plans built to hit commercial goals.

items.label: Content
items.title: Content Architecture
items.value: Culturally-tuned Arabic/English content systems across every format.

items.label: Performance
items.title: Paid Campaigns
items.value: Meta, Google, Snapchat and TikTok performance buying.

items.label: Growth
items.title: Social Media Growth
items.value: Always-on channel management and community growth.

items.label: Sector
items.title: Healthcare Marketing
items.value: Integrated campaigns for medical brands and clinics.

items.label: Sector
items.title: F&B / Retail Campaigns
items.value: Launches and always-on content for F&B and retail brands.

items.label: Activation
items.title: Event & Sponsorship Activations
items.value: On-ground experiences that turn footfall into fans.

items.label: Insight
items.title: Performance Reporting
items.value: Reporting and insight loops that compound results.

experience.title: Where strategy met results
experience.intro: Five-plus years leading marketing across sports, healthcare, retail and pharma in Jordan and Saudi Arabia.

work.title: A living archive of brands & campaigns
work.intro: A curated, filterable archive built dynamically from real client work — images, films and brand documents. Swipe, drag or let it play; tap the focused project to open its gallery.

clients.intro: A selection of clients and partners across healthcare, sports, F&B, real estate and retail in Jordan and Saudi Arabia.

caseStudies.title: Selected client stories
caseStudies.intro: Deeper dives into flagship engagements across sports, healthcare, real estate and F&B. Published stories open a dedicated case page; previews are clearly marked.

results.title: Performance, proven
results.intro: Selected campaign snapshots from real accounts. Figures represent individual campaign periods, not lifetime totals.
results.note: * Selected campaign snapshots — labelled to avoid over-claiming aggregate performance.

reels.title: Words from clients & community
reels.intro: Real replies and reactions from the campaigns and communities built along the way. Tap a highlight to watch the story.

tools.title: The command center
tools.intro: The advertising, analytics and creative stack behind every campaign.

contact.title: Ready to build
contact.intro: Connect with Sultan for brand positioning, marketing strategy, campaign management, content, and business development support.
contact.note: Direct email, WhatsApp, phone, and a focused message form are on the contact page.
